productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Strappy Black Floater
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these strappy sandals from red tape. The clean design coupled with high quality material makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear. Team this with jeans and tees for a laid back look.Upper Strappy leather uppers over the forefoot and midfoot to give a snug Fit Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Ankle strap with velcro closure on the back for securing the foot Midsole Padded suede footbed for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with horizontal grooves for better grip Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Wash careRub surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
